entry.title: Re: Document obsolete in SAP Opentext
entry.content:
Hi,

In case if after obsoleting DP document in SWO1 you still see it in /OPT/VIM_WP, try running ABAP Report /OPT/CR_PMC_REG_UPDATE. It synchronizes the DP document data and adjusts the technical tables that hold workflow-relevant data used by VIM Workplace. It helped me in case when the workflow item was missing from the system (no longer available).

Otherwise, try using SWIA/SWI1 to see what's the status of the workflow item. If it is no longer needed, you can technically delete the workflow item by cancelling it.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Created CDS View Entity with added new concatenated field of total price and currency code and Overall status text field using Association.

Result :

Happy Learning! 😊

Thanks

entry.title: Re: IS THERE ANY ALTERNATIVE OF MC.9 IN PUBLIC CLOUD 2408
entry.content:
Hello @praneshti23 

Unfortunately there is not. 

The note 3126267 - What are successor Fiori apps for Inventory Controlling (Application 03) report like MC.9 in S/4HANA system? lists some inventory controlling Fiori apps but they are nowhere as useful as MC.9.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Process Diagram transfer between Signavio – Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi @Ajay88 ,

 

would you know how can we get the existing diagrams from Process Collaboration Hub to Process Manager?

In the SuccessFactors Collaboration Hub I have the possibility to export an existing (published by SAP) diagram only  into the PDF format and I would need them in the BPMN 2.0. XML format so that I can import them in the Process Manager

Thank you and kind regards,

Karolina

entry.title: Re: Implementation will not be called
entry.content: It's "SE18 is used by SAP and customers", it should be SE19 is used by SAP and customers, should it not?

entry.title: Re: Implementation will not be called
entry.content:
Hello @Catherine3 

You need to create a BAdI implementation with SE19. Then your implementation will be called.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Account 600002 in company code 2014 cannot be directly posted to
entry.content:
Account 600002 in company code 2014 cannot be directly posted to

THIS IS ACCOUNT DETERMINATION ERROR INVOICE ALREADY SAVE BUT ACCOUNT NOT CLEAR AND 600002 IS RECONCILLATION GL ACCOUNT

entry.title: Re: Implementation will not be called
entry.content: Yes 2nd line should been SE19 (corrected)

entry.title: Re: EHS OCC settings are grouped differently in Prod and...
entry.content:
Hi @dazeli 

In the PROD Screenshot, the "Globe/Earth" Button is not activated and therefore the regulations are not grouped by region.

The PRE-PROD has the "Globe/Earth" Button is activated and therefore the regulations are grouped by region.

If the "Globe/Earth" Button is activated might be a user specific setting - stored for each system...

Hope this helps

Mark

entry.title: New pilots to empower customers to leverage AI and SAP HANA Cloud capabilities to innovate faster
entry.content:
Artificial Intelligence or AI is disrupting business everywhere! Organizations are looking at ways to innovate and update their business processes to make best use of AI to make savings and add improved functionality to their customers. As we come to terms with AI’s vast potential, SAP has adjusted its strategy with the goal of becoming not only the leading enterprise application provider but also the number one business AI company. SAP provides opportunities to use AI to unlock new levels of efficiency and innovation in their customer’s businesses.

To support this strategy, in SAP Enterprise Support we are providing two upcoming pilots of Expert Guided Implementation services through the SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council program designed to empower customers with the knowledge and skills to leverage SAP HANA Cloud’s advanced capabilities and AI to improve efficiency and innovation in organizations.

Expert Guided Implementation (EGI) services are multi-day remote delivered sessions, delivered through by SAP Enterprise Support Academy and typically delivered over 3-5 working days. In short, this is a virtual classroom style session, where an SAP expert explains step-by-step the configuration of a set objective using training materials and step-by-step demonstration.

In our first pilot EGI service, we delve into Multiple Model Programming using the SAP HANA Vector Engine and explore how Generative AI, specifically Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), can transform customer’s data management and AI strategies. The service is designed to provide a comprehensive understanding of SAP HANA Cloud’s advanced features and how they can be leveraged to support cutting-edge AI applications. By the end of the service, customers will be equipped with skills to implement multiple model programming, utilize the Vector Engine, and enhance your AI models with Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG). Plus, insights into effective data tiering strategies to optimize data management will be provided.

In our second pilot EGI service, we equip customers with the skills and knowledge to harness the power of the SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) model in SAP HANA Cloud. The service will introduce you to SAP Build Code and Joule, SAP’s generative AI assistant, to streamline application development processes. The service provides with a comprehensive understanding of the SAP CAP model and how to effectively use SAP Build Code and Joule to accelerate your application development. By the end of the service, customers will have the skills to develop robust CAP applications, utilize SAP HANA Cloud for data management, and leverage generative AI to enhance your coding efficiency.

Please join us for this exciting journey into the world of Generative AI, Joule and SAP HANA Cloud and unlock new possibilities for your business! For further queries including how to join these pilots, reach out to the SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council directly at mailto:esac@sap.com.

Thanks and Regards,

Robert Kelly

BTP Lead – SAP Enterprise Support

entry.title: Re: Getting Started with Phase Model in Maintenance Management
entry.content:
Hi Gerhard,

Thanks for the update. I have one query, how one can restrict users to go to one phase to another without skipping any phase. I have just implemented New phase methodology for one of the client in Greenfield implementation. User are able to skip from scheduling to Dispatching without completing the scheduling phase. Already deselected skipping in Overall status config. Am i missing something or we need to go for development to block this as one can do direct TECO also right now.

Regards

Yogesh Sharma

entry.title: Re: How to increase message processing log retention period from default 30 days in SAP CPI
entry.content: SAP does not allow us to adjust the period of retention of logs more than 30 days and we found the solution was to we might retrieve older logs by raising a support ticket to LOD-HCI-PI-OPS we want to know is the logs date be permanent or can change from 30 days to more and with time after raising a ticket?? and can we raise this type of ticket again and again ticket or possible to extend the date of retention

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Hi,

Task 2 is completed.

entry.title: How to properly refresh Object Page data when it's affected by req.on succeeded of draftActivation?
entry.content:
Hi colleagues

I'm trying to implement next scenario:

I have 2 Node.js apps working with a same data. First app hosts a service to input data (let's call it Contracts). Second app is performing (re)calculations for the Contracts on demand.

I want to trigger re-calculation when I successfully activate the draft so in the input app I'm using

async onAfterContractActicate(res: Contract, req: any): Promise<void> {
        const ID: Contract["ID"] = req.data.ID;

        req.on('succeeded', async () => {
            const srv = await cds.connect.to('ExternalCalculatorService');
            await srv.post(`/Contracts(ID=${ID},IsActiveEntity=true)/calculate`, {});
        });
    }

so the desired logic is:

  1. draft is saved
  2. draft activation triggered - request started
  3. transaction started
  4. active entity is being created / updated
  5. transaction is committed
  6. external re-calculation for the Contract is being called
  7. awaiting external re-calculation - it should return re-calculated Contract
  8. reply with the re-calculated contract

The issue is that the succeeded event is triggered after the response is being prepared and finalised so it's too late to change res or trigger req.reply as it's simply ignored.

The question is - how to get re-calculated data to the object page without weird FE extensions?
I tried

Common.SideEffects #ContractDraftActivated: {
TriggerAction: 'SiteService.draftActivate'
}
but obviously it's not a solution.

entry.title: Re: EHS OCC settings are grouped differently in Prod and...

entry.title: Re: EHS OCC settings are grouped differently in Prod and...

entry.title: Re: Copying/Migrating data in SAP HANA Cloud

Hello yves_augustin2
First of all thanks for this blog.


What would be best way to Copying/Migrating data in SAP HANA Cloud from one to another SAP HANA Cloud instance and consolidate data?  

Thanks!

Best Regards,

Masan

entry.title: Re: I can not find /UI5/ABAP_REPOSITORY_SRV in my system.
entry.content: The frontend part for what the /UI5/ABAP_REPOSITORY_SRV service is used needs only be deployed to the frontend server. No need to have it in the backend.

entry.title: Material Codification
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have a client requirement for Material Master codification, the codification must be based on Family, sub family and then an incrementation. 

Example : 

XX - for Family (Eg:10)

YYY - for sub-Family (Eg:100)

ZZZ - for incrementation 

--> Material codification must be like this 10100001 

Is It any way to do this requirement in SAP S/4 HANA MM ? 

Thanks in advance. 

Ghassen.

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
@MayarHassan- Best of luck on your journey! May it be filled with success, growth, and incredible experiences every step of the way.

To enhance your understanding and skills in SAP SuccessFactors, I highly recommend engaging in self-study of the THR97 course. This course provides comprehensive insights into the Recruit to Retire process, covering key modules and functionalities essential for mastering employee lifecycle management within SAP SuccessFactors. Dedicating time to this self-study will significantly boost your proficiency and prepare you for practical application in real-world scenarios.

Here is link you can check https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/configuring-sap-successfactors-onboarding 

Good Luck

Eslam Salah

entry.title: Re: Absence Counting Rules 2.0 in Time Management - 2H 2023
entry.content:
@PriyankaAgarwal 

Hi,

our customer is a healthcare organization and employees work in shifts, hence they sometimes also have to work on holidays. TimeOff is implemented but for Time Recording they are using a third party software (for now).

Employees only get a "dummy" workshedule which is then temporarily adjusted by HR when needed.

Now the requisition is as follows:

If an employee is obligated to work on a holiday and a temporary workshedule is used, any TimeOff requests should deduct normally on this day.

The use case that comes closest to what I need in that case is "absence counting on non-working days". But this does not quite fit for the request.

Because It depends solely on the temporary work shedule if the absence should be counted or not. Also the Time Type is in hours not days.

It seems that the holiday calendar "overrules" the temporary work shedule. Is this true?

How do I configure this correctly? Is this even possible? Do you have an idea?

Thank you very much

KR Jan

entry.title: SmartFilter Value Help With Annotations Issue
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am working on a UI5 Project. Here is a short context before getting into the issue. 

I have a dialog box which shows smartfilter with smarttable. I have bound them to a cap entity. I maintained UI annotations in the annotations.cds file. 

My Cap service has got two entities. One entity named ActionLogOverview provides data to the smarttable. Another entity ExtRef acts as value help for the smartfilter. 


Here is my annotation for valuehelp



Below is my UI Code for the smartfilter 


Below is my UI

Now when I click ExtRef, the popup looks like the below. I am not getting the table layout to choose the ExtRef values. 

Even on clicking the value help in the above image, it opens the same dialog on top of it. Nothing happens. 
However, in the network, i can see the values are fetched from the Value Help Entity successfully. 

P.s. I am on SAP UI5 version - '1.120.3'

entry.title: Simplified access to the administration console of SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI
entry.content:
Access to the administration console of SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI is managed using identity provider groups. With the latest enhancements, we give customers the flexibility to define their own custom group names for this purpose, in addition to the existing default group names. This makes it possible to support customers’ naming conventions and work around restrictions of 3rd party identity providers.

Access to the administration console of SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI is managed by two identity provider groups, one allowing read-only access and one for full administrative access. Up until now, the names of these groups were hard-coded, namely SecureLoginServiceViewer and SecureLoginServiceAdministrator.

What’s new?

With the latest enhancement, customers can define two additional groups with customer-specific names, one for read-only and one for change access to the administration console. Members of these groups will then have the respective access in the administration console.

How does it work?

We extended the administration console of SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI with a configuration section for the two group names. When customers specify groups names in this configuration, members of these groups will receive access to the administration console, in addition to the members of the original default groups. As the original group names remain valid as well, customers will always be able to regain access to the administration console, even if they configured custom names that are not supported by their identity provider. 

What is the benefit?

Customers can now manage access to the administration console of SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI with groups that fit a naming convention they might have. In addition, integration with 3rd party identity providers is simplified, for example in the case where the 3rd party identity provider does not send group names but only group object ids in the token.

More information

You will find details on the new feature in the product documentation at https://help.sap.com/sls

entry.title: Re: Implementation will not be called
entry.content: Did you activated implementation? I see it "Inactive" on your screenshot...

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Express: SAP XSA installation failed
entry.content: Are you able to ping rammi-laptop-i7 from Linux? Is this entry in /etc/hosts? When the install starts, it asks for the host name. I assume this value was entered then.

entry.title: Re: DELINS,SEQJIT,DELJIT
entry.content:
Hi and thanks for sharing this explanatory post!

I was wondering if you have any input on how to decide which message type to use in which scenario, when DELINS can be used in both delivery schedules?

For example, if I plan to have a sales scheduling agreement with a forecast for 60 weeks and a JIT delivery schedule for 10 days, would I opt for DELINS in the forecast schedule, and DELJIT or SEQJIT in the JIT delivery schedule? How is the information provided in the JIT schedule triggering the creation of a JIT call?

entry.title: Re: Use business user rather than communication user for...
entry.content: Dear Varun, thanks for your feedback. I'm aware of this, was just wondering whether there's an alternative option since - as mentioned - there's no way to distinguish authorization-wise if all calls use the same user. Regards Wolfgang

entry.title: Re: Fiori App F2359 Error: Target was not found
entry.content:
Hi,

we implemented the note and reactivated the OData services, still the same error.

Did any other solutions come up yet?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: How Do I Copy Master Data Fields to a Sales Document?
entry.content:
Hi Brinda,
Yes, that should be possible in a similar way like that example.

Unfortunately there is currently no business scenario for custom fields from customer master to sales document available, but you can use the following workaround:

  • Create a custom field in customer master (Business Context CUSTOMER_GENERAL)
  • Create a custom field in sales document (Business Context SD_SALESDOC)

To copy the value of the custom field from customer master into sales document, you can use the same approach as used in this blog. Implement custom logic "Modification of Header Custom Fields in Sales Documents" (SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD) to get the value via a select on I_Customer into the custom field of the sales document. To automatically copy it further to the delivery document, you can use the business scenario "Sales Document to Delivery on Header Level". Further details on business scenarios with some example can be found in that blog.

entry.title: Re: Landing of Inbound Delivery in Queue.
entry.content: You can only re-register the queue, which results that all you DLV* queue will be in SMQ2, you need to manually process it. but if you do so, irrespective of OBD/IBD, all the DLV* queue will be in SMQ2. you cannot achieve it by standard. i suggest you to remove your auto distribution if IBD, and you can distribute it manually.

entry.title: Re: Everything you need to know about: SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub
entry.content:
Hi @RinkyKarthik  - Are the 2nd level Managers be able to see the skills of their 2nd level reportees under "Team View"? If so,how?

Thanks,

Avinash

entry.title: Re: Issues with Master Data Transfer from ERP HANA Cloud...
entry.content:
Hi,

Regarding #1, see Transferring a Master Routing, where it reads:

Note
Once you've transferred the master routing, SAP Digital Manufacturing calls the BOM from your SAP S/4HANA Cloud system if at least one component is assigned to the routing step. For more information, see Updating and Upversioning a BOM.
 
So you might want to double check and review both your BOM and Integration setup, including Destination S4H_ODATA_INTEGRATION.
You might also want to evaluate replicating Business Object Type: Production Version of Material from S/4HC to DM, which is part of Production Planning Master Data Integration (SAP_COM_0519).

Regarding #2, this is working by design, as order-specific BOM and Routing are indeed always created for every single new order by design.

Hope it helps,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: Landing of Inbound Delivery in Queue.
entry.content: You can only re-register the queue, which results that all you DLV* queue will be in SMQ2, you need to manually process it. but if you do so, irrespective of OBD/IBD, all the DLV* queue will be in SMQ2. you cannot achieve it by standard. i suggest you to remove your auto distribution if IBD, and you can distribute it manually.

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Fun quick tip: Adding HTML code to your Message Definition and Alerts and reduce
entry.content:
Great article, 

A great way to store these images is hosting them on sites like https://postimages.org/.

Also for you to use these trick in email Alerts you have to enable the below check from Company and Logo settings.

entry.title: Upload Fixed Assets for Version 10.0
entry.content:
Hi,

I have the template for OITM and I need to upload fixed assets.

There are 4 fields in OITM on the screen that I need to upload but are not in my template.  How can I get the fields for these files?  I pulled the field names from this web site, it says SQL but shouldnt the field names be the same? https://biuan.com/OITM

I need the field names for row A and row B in DTW.

AcqDate      - Acquisition Date
AsstStatus   - Asset Status
LastPurDat  - Last Purchase Date
LastPurPrc  -  Last Purchase Price

entry.title: Re: Material Codification
entry.content:
Hello @GHASSEN 

You can number materials whichever way you need in S/4HANA. However I would discourage any logic in a material number itself. Such logic will break sooner or latter (been that, done that) and material number can't be changed once created. Instead model family, subfamily etc. with material master attributes or with the classification system.

Also notice that serial number mustn't be part of a material number. A material number identifies a product, whereas a serial number identifies a single piece of the product. Think of your mobile phone - a material number is the phone model e.g. iPhone 15 Pro (for the sake of simplicity, let's leave product version aside), whereas a serial number is the identifier of the individual device that you use (in case of iOS you can find it in Settings -> General -> About -> Serial Number)

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Reason for mouvement not showing in MIGO Good Issue
entry.content:
I find the solution by adding the field : GRUND for reason for mouvement in 

SAP Customizing Implementation Guide -> Materials Management -> Inventory Management and Physical Inventory -> Settings for Goods Movements (MIGO) -> Field Selection per Movement Type

entry.title: DTP failed while loading the data from Query(as infoprovider) to ADSO
entry.content:
Hello,

DTP failed while loading the data from Query(as infoprovider) to ADSO, this was worked fine one time but later it starts giving the below error while extracting data.


An error occurred when getting data from the processor.
Error reading the data of InfoProvider @Q<name of the Query>
Error while extracting from source 003YPSVRR***<Query techname> (type InfoProvider)
Error reading the data of InfoProvider @Q<name of the Query>

Note: 

Transformation and DTP is active, Query is working fine when we run it in RSRT, giving error while loading from DTP Only.
we created few more flows like same but others are working fine except this flow..

please suggest that did i missed something here ? 

thanks in advance.

Regards,

Vasudev.

entry.title: Re: Account 600002 in company code 2014 cannot be directly posted to
entry.content: As the error itself indicates, account 600002 is a reconciliation account and cannot have accounting entries directly in it.

entry.title: Re: Posting Change with RF
entry.content: There is no way of doing posting change in RF, if you want you have to use Custom Enhancement, where you can call FM- /scwm/gm_create, /scwm/gm_post, /scwm/stock_change

entry.title: PR/PO Flexible Workflow with role Assignment
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert,

I have a requirement to add user's manager to the approval workflow without using the HR module (it's not included in the project).

I tried to handle the requirement using SAP Flexible workflow for PR/PO and i didn't understand how to link the role to the user manager (i'm on the Manage workflow for Purchase requisitions app)

Client doesn't have HR module activated. Do i need to have HR module activated or is there any other standard solution ?

entry.title: Re: Material Codification
entry.content: @GHASSEN best to listen to what Dominik is saying because I've been through that experience also, and there's no reason that can't be baked into classification (or even product hierarchy depending on how you have it structured).

entry.title: I am getting this error during vendor creation, Facing problem in practice server.
Re: OPTIMIZER RUN FAILED DUE TO VSR OPTIMIZER /SCMTMS/PLN_BGD010
entry.content:
Whenever your Optimizer run Fails you always need to check 3 thing.

1. Resource master

2. Lane Master
3. Zone Master

Based on the above 3 things Generally Optimizer fails, possible reason - Cost too high, Couldn't able to find lane/Resource.

entry.title: Re: Chart of Accounts & Assign
entry.content:
Hello Dears 

I`m asking about any possibilities to hide the default COAs by SAP in F4 List? 

any recommendations?

entry.title: Agreement Number VBAK-KNUMA is not updated using ORDERS IDOC
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

     I need to update the field VBAK-KNUMA (Agreement number) using an ORDERS IDOC. However, this field is not available for update online using VA01 but IDOC documentation says that it can be updated using segment E1EDK02 segment with qualifier 072 and the agreement no text in E1EDK02-BELNR field. I did that and the sales order was successfully created from the IDOC, however the field VBAK-KNUMA was not updated. 

    Is this because the field VBAK-KNUMA is not available online for updates and hence the function module 'IDOC_INPUT_ORDERS' which is called during processing of the IDOC, doesn't update the fields which are not available for online VA01 update.

Please let me know your opinion on this.

Regards

Anustup Chakrabarti

entry.title: Re: How to do reversal of picking in case of mixed handling Units?
entry.content: Generally Cancel pick meaning removing the delivery link with stock ID and then putback. What you can do a trick, you can open Advance serach button, put the delivery which is linked to one HU and execute, it will fin all the Delivery with 1 hu, goto HU tab and release Stock.

entry.title: Re: FI_TAX_SERVICES_CALCULATE
entry.content:
@raymond_giuseppi

I called method fi_tax_services=>calculate as you suggested.

The behavior of the method and FB60 is different for the following scenario:

  1. There is a vendor line without tax code (MWSKZ is initial)
  2. There is a GL line without tax code (MWSKZ is initial)
  3. 'calculate tax' is checked

 

The method updates the tax code to a value that means no tax.

FB60 raises a blocking  error: 'G/L account xxxxxx requires a valid tax code'

 How can I force the method to behave as standard?

The call to the method is:

  CALL METHOD fi_tax_services=>calculate
    EXPORTING
      documentheader    = gs_doc_header
      accountpayable    = gt_accountpayable
      accountreceivable = gt_accountreceivable
*     distribute_deduct = SPACE
*     taxamount         =
    IMPORTING
      return_code       = lv_subrc
    CHANGING
      currencyamount    = gt_currencyamount
      accountgl         = gt_accountgl
      accounttax        = gt_accounttax
      return            = lt_return.

Thankyou in advance

Hagit

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Agreement Number VBAK-KNUMA is not updated using ORDERS IDOC
entry.content: I don't see qualifier '072' read in the processing of 'IDOC_INPUT_ORDERS', but you also won't be able to update it via IDoc if you cannot update it in VA01.

entry.title: How to get Number of Pay Periods
entry.content: Trying to write a business rule for a custom mdf and part of that would require duration of time spent in a program code and then looks at a lookup table for a dollar value.   My business rule is working properly by using Get Number of Calendar Days, however since we are paid semi-monthly that results in variations.  Has anyone created a lookup table to count the number of pay periods between two dates?

entry.title: Re: Agreement Number VBAK-KNUMA is not updated using ORDE...
entry.content: Thanks and yes, that was my opinion too that if the field is not available in VA01, IDOC update wont be possible.

entry.title: Re: Adobe forms - hide field, move fields up
entry.content:
FormPurchaseOrderRequest.Main.Invoice.Table1.Row1.Table4[1].Row1.Cell2::initialize - (JavaScript, client)
if ($record.PurchaseOrder.BuyerParty.BuyerID.value != null && $record.PurchaseOrder.BuyerParty.BuyerID.value != '') {
// Actions to take when BuyerID has a value
this.presence = "hidden"; // Example: Hiding the current object if BuyerID has a value
} else {
// Actions to take when BuyerID does NOT have a value (either null or empty)
this.presence = "visible"; // Example: Making the current object visible if BuyerID does not have a value
}

Use This  type of code its will Work I think.....

entry.title: LMS: Report to see when a user first accessed (started) an online item
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a report to show when a user first accessed (or started) an online item?

I can find when it was assigned via the Learning Needs report and when they completed it via an Online Item Status report, but I cannot see anywhere to get the date/time it was first accessed/started.

I have looked in Story Reports as well and cannot find a table with the relevant fields.

Thanks for your help.

Julia

entry.title: 30-candidates profile Deadline Enforced in SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m looking for clarification on the application process within SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting. I’ve heard that there might be a 30-day deadline after profile creation for submitting a job application.

He/ She has only 30 days after creation of the profile that he needs to apply for a job and after this period success factors send mail to the candidate to reactivate the profile again how I can make this cycle using business rule

entry.title: Re: how to print handling units in custom physical inventory form in EWM
entry.content: The PI form can be printed upon creation on WO, each PI which you create will generate the WO. you should develop a form, custom PPF for the WO based on your condition, and maintain the condition table, once you do it, each WO for PI the system will call the PPF and that will call your form.

entry.title: Re: Source DMIS 2011 SP27 - repl. server DMIS 2011 SP16 compatibility
entry.content: Hello Eddie, I'm confirming with development and will get back to you as soon as I receive a response.

entry.title: Aborted TWB-Job SMT_BATCH_EXECUTE
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

When we are trying to execute out test scripts via job in SolMan system but it is giving me a timeout error after 1.801 sec. The Job RSTWB_BG_TSTPRX_COLLECT is throwing the below error.

 

"Start timeout reached - TWB-Job: SMT_BATCH_EXECUTE
Aborted TWB-Job SMT_BATCH_EXECUTE"

 

I have also set the parameter TSTPRX_CENTRAL_COLL as per the Note 2299335, though we are in latest SolMan version of 7.2 SP18. Could somebody help to resolve this issue.

entry.title: Re: Warehouse Picking by 2 workers
entry.content: If the activity area is different then use PICK-PACK-PASS process. meaning picking form one area by one picker, and upon completion next subsequent WO will open for picking and the other worker take the Hu and complete it.

entry.title: Re: 30-candidates profile Deadline Enforced in SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting
entry.content: Please don't post to Questions about SAP Websites (issue with community Website, etc.) if it's a question about SAP software. Instead, ask in Technology Q&A: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions. Hopefully someone will fix it for you.

entry.title: Excise tax configuration guide
entry.content:
Hello All,

 

Looking for condition based excise tax configuration guide for India including reports.

 

Thanks,

Shamiulla.

entry.title: How to Prevent Deletion of Input Controls in Webi Reports While Allowing Usage?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In a webi report with a group of input controls, I’ve applied the sap note: 1937176 - How to grant filtering functionality for Web Intelligence reports without enabling the Design application mode? With that note, my users can consume the input controls and only can access the report in reading mode.

Now besides of it, the extra requirement is to avoid that users can delete (suppress) the input controls, e.g., that can consume/use the input controls but not to delete them.

System version: BusinessObjects 4.3 SP2 P7 14.3.2.4385

Any advice to accomplish this? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAC Foreach restricted by time
entry.content:
@MoonJun 

I have always had hard time with variables as they are additive and do not get cleared when next record arrives. I had first written my code using variables but I think I was having issues with them getting cleared ( may be I made mistakes as I wrote in hurry). Could you try changing the project life of second project from first year to some other year ( different than 1st project) and see if your code still works.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Bill of exchange
entry.content:
Hello All,

 

Could anyone please help with bill of exchange dishonour case with what step need to be performed in FBZG.

Whether any preconfiguration need to be done for DME for FBZG.

 

Thanks,

Shamiulla.

entry.title: Re: RF: Verification profile settings for picking
entry.content: You can create your own Warehouse-Specific Verification control- Path- SPRO-SCM Extended Warehouse Management - Extended Warehouse Management - Mobile Data Entry - Verification Control - Define Warehouse-Specific Verification &&&Define Warehouse-Specific Verification Determination-------- assign it to your activity and combination with WO no

entry.title: Re: Error no. L9029 is raised during qRFC processing from EWM
entry.content: Did you check below configuration and have defined the movement type- (your mvt type) in WM IMG > LE > WM > Interfaces > IM > define movement types WM have its own movement types then Inventory management of MM.

entry.title: Re: How to Use Custom Fields for Pricing in Sales Documents
entry.content:
Hi @CE6 ,

Im my case we have extended only the Business Context: Sales: Pricing Communication Head (SD_PRICECOMHEAD) with required custom fields. 

Now to map the data for these custom fields in KOMK structure do we have any BADI available or we need to use the FORM USEREXIT_PRICING_PREPARE_TKOMK ?

As i have not extended the business scenario 'Sales Document to Pricing Communication on Item Level' how to map the data in KOMK structure? 

Thanks,

Kiran

entry.title: Re: My Object Page V4 is empty , except Header. Even i ca...
entry.content:
Hi @junwu  , I used Annotation #LINEITEM_REFERENCE , still I can't see anything , Could you please help me.

Below is my Metadata extension with the above annotation added. Please correct me where the problem is. 

One more thing , is the kind of PACKAGE to which we saved also effect the object page ? I have saved my changes to a Super package, means under which childs will be there. 

 

@Metadata.layer: #CORE

 

@ui: { headerInfo:{

typeName: 'Mapping Table',

typeNamePlural: 'Mapping Table',

title: {

type: #STANDARD,

label: 'Mapping Table',

value: 'Companycode'

},

description.value: 'Companycode' }

}

 

 

 

@Search.searchable: true

annotate view ZC_BIMAMAPPING

with

{

 

@ui.facet: [{ id: 'Mapping Data',

purpose: #STANDARD,

type: #LINEITEM_REFERENCE,

label: 'Mapping Details',

targetQualifier: 'LineItems',

position: 10 } ]

 

@ui: { lineItem: [{ position: 10 }],

identification: [{ position: 10 }],

selectionField: [{ position: 10 }] ,

identification: [{qualifier: 'LineItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Company Code'

Companycode;

 

@ui: { lineItem: [{ position: 20 }],

identification: [{ position: 20 }],

selectionField: [{ position: 20 }],

identification: [{qualifier: 'LineItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Mapping Type'

Maptype;

 

@ui: { lineItem: [{ position: 30 }],

identification: [{ position: 30 }],

selectionField: [{ position: 30 }],

identification: [{qualifier: 'LineItems'}] }

@Search.defaultSearchElement: true

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Source Value'

Sourcevalue;

 

@ui: { lineItem: [{ position: 40 }],

identification: [{ position: 40 }],

identification: [{qualifier: 'LineItems'}]}

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Target Value'

Targetvalue;

 

@ui: {

identification: [{ position: 50 }] ,

identification: [{qualifier: 'LineItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Created By'

created_by;

 

@ui: {

identification: [{ position: 60 }] ,

identification: [{qualifier: 'LineItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Created At'

created_at;

 

@ui: {

identification: [{ position: 70 }] ,

identification: [{qualifier: 'LineItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Last Changed By'

last_changed_by;

 

@ui: {

identification: [{ position: 80 }] ,

identification: [{qualifier: 'LineItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Last Changed At'

last_changed_at;

 

//@UI.hidden: true

//ExcelRowNumber;

 

}

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Task2 done!

entry.title: Re: Entering SAP Signavio certification
entry.content: Do you also have some Certification Werkshops for Business Process Manager in the Pipeline?

entry.title: Re: Possibility to block users using old SAP GUI version
entry.content: You can use the approach outlined in SAP Note 748424 - "Evaluation of SAP GUI versions and patches" to determine the version used to connect and can then decide what to do.

entry.title: Gross profit Base Price not showing
entry.content:
I hope this message finds you well. We've encountered an intermittent issue with our SAP software regarding the visibility of purchase price data. As it's sporadic, it's been challenging to pinpoint the exact cause.

 

Problem Description:

 

At irregular intervals, purchase price data entered into the software does not appear in the system.

Users report that despite correctly inputting purchase price information during data entry, there are instances where this data does not display in the SAP software interface or reports.

The inconsistency of this issue makes it difficult to predict.

 

 

I hope this message finds you well. We've encountered an intermittent issue with our SAP software regarding the visibility of purchase price data. As it's sporadic, it's been challenging to pinpoint the exact cause.

 

Problem Description:

 

At irregular intervals, purchase price data entered into the software does not appear in the system.

Users report that despite correctly inputting purchase price information during data entry, there are instances where this data does not display in the SAP software interface or reports.

The inconsistency of this issue makes it difficult to predict.

entry.title: Re: COLUMN NAMES STRIPPING AFTER 30 CHARs when replicating SAP HANA DB as source SAP SLT
entry.content: Hello, please see KBA https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2727771

entry.title: Re: EWM LOSC - how to choose any source HU
entry.content: SAP Standard System will always create WT with some Stock, you can do RF enhancement, using Wrapper FM, where you can put one button, and upon click as user to scan any HU, it will link the current HU to the DLV and old link for Stock ID will go off. this is the only possible solution i can think of.

entry.title: I’m looking for clarification on the application process within SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting. I’ve
entry.content:
I’m looking for clarification on the application process within SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting. I’ve heard that there might be a 30-day deadline after profile creation for submitting a job application.

He/ She has only 30 days after creation of the profile that he needs to apply for a job and after this period success factors send mail to the candidate to reactivate the profile again how I can make this cycle using business rule

entry.title: Re: Possibility to block users using old SAP GUI version
entry.content:
You can use the approach outlined in SAP Note 748424 - "Evaluation of SAP GUI versions and patches" to determine the version used to connect and can then decide what to do (like aborting the log on and displaying a dialog box to the user). I have seen such approaches a couple of times already. The code needs to be developed by you.
However, my preference would generally be to do this rather via a software inventory and push updates to users who have older versions of SAP GUI installed.

Best regards,
Frank

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
Hi @MayarHassan- welcome!! In addition to what @EslamSalah has recommended - please also feel free to view the following recommendations:

  • Join the Beginner Corner
  • Join the SAP Learning group
  • SAP Managed Tags (subscribe to your topic areas of interest)

Best of luck!

entry.title: Re: Can customers expand default memory size?
entry.content: The table you extracted for the GROW Service Use Description applies to S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.  We offer a maximum memory specification based on the number of full use equivalent users (FUEs) as outlined in that table. Customers can buy system extensions in cases where they have or plan to exceed that maximum memory allocation.  These are sold in 128GB increments and can be sold to customer who bought GROW with S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition base or premium.

entry.title: Re: DTP failed while loading the data from Query(as infoprovider) to ADSO
entry.content:
Hello Vasudev. It is just a first idea... have you checked all the criteria listed here?

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw75/7.5.5/en-US/4b/c347cd494650e9e10000000a15822b/content.htm?no_cache=true

Maybe some technical restriction prevents it?

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Problem Flexible Billing Document Numbering not provi...
entry.content:
Hi,

The assignment is done, but still gives the same error:

Can you help us?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: I am getting this error during vendor creation, Facing problem in practice server.
entry.content: Check transaction FK08 or FK09

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Express: SAP XSA installation failed
entry.content:
@Dan_vL 

Thanks for answered,

i think the setted hostname caused the error. Inititally i used the proposed name, which is my environment and it was not added to /etc/hosts.

After choose a new hostname and setup in the /etc/hosts the installation was successfully.

entry.title: Re: Showing the Currency type and rates in a SAC Story
entry.content: Only with inconvenient workarounds & at your own risk: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/leverage-data-export-service-to-view-currency-table-data/ba-p/13756442

entry.title: ALV CONTROLL TREE
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

As shown in the image, I am facing a problem that I would like to solve:

When I select the values C1 and C2 either by marking them or by checking the checkboxes and then click on the "Delete" button, the rows A1 and B1 are unfortunately also counted in the background.

Normally, I use the methods GET_CHECKED_ITEMS and GET_SELECTED_NODES from the class CL_GUI_ALV_TREE_SIMPLE. However, the EXPORTING parameters of these methods return the wrong index. In my example, the values C1 and C2 are assigned indices 3 and 4, respectively, because the rows A and B1 are also counted in the background.

Therefore, I am asking for your help in solving this issue.

Thank you in advance.

Radouane

entry.title: Failed to load component for container - ModuleError: failed to load
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm experiencing an issue with loading a component in my SAPUI5 application. The error message I'm seeing is:

"Failed to load component for container - ModuleError: failed to load 'employeeapplication/SharedBlocks/PersonalDetails.js' from ./SharedBlocks/PersonalDetails.js: script load error"

My manifest.json file looks like this:

{
  "_version": "1.59.0",
  "sap.app": {
    "id": "employeeapplication",
    "type": "application",
    "i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties",
    "applicationVersion": {
      "version": "0.0.1"
    },
    "title": "{{appTitle}}",
    "description": "{{appDescription}}",
    "resources": "resources.json",
    "sourceTemplate": {
      "id": "@sap/generator-fiori:basic",
      "version": "1.14.1",
      "toolsId": "9e31bfee-31bb-417f-bee7-4d3c1801703c"
    },
    "dataSources": {
      "mainService": {
        "uri": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZUI_C_PNL/",
        "type": "OData",
        "settings": {
          "annotations": [],
          "localUri": "localService/metadata.xml",
          "odataVersion": "2.0"
        }
      }
    },
    "crossNavigation": {
      "inbounds": {
        "zpc_emp-display": {
          "semanticObject": "zpc_emp",
          "action": "display",
          "title": "{{flpTitle}}",
          "signature": {
            "parameters": {},
            "additionalParameters": "allowed"
          }
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "sap.ui": {
    "technology": "UI5",
    "icons": {
      "icon": "",
      "favIcon": "",
      "phone": "",
      "phone@2": "",
      "tablet": "",
      "tablet@2": ""
    },
    "deviceTypes": {
      "desktop": true,
      "tablet": true,
      "phone": true
    }
  },
  "sap.ui5": {
    "flexEnabled": true,
    "dependencies": {
      "minUI5Version": "1.121.6",
      "libs": {
        "sap.m": {},
        "sap.ui.core": {},
        "sap.f": {},
        "sap.suite.ui.generic.template": {},
        "sap.ui.comp": {},
        "sap.ui.generic.app": {},
        "sap.ui.table": {},
        "sap.ushell": {}
      }
    },
    "contentDensities": {
      "compact": true,
      "cozy": true
    },
    "models": {
      "i18n": {
        "type": "sap.ui.model.resource.ResourceModel",
        "settings": {
          "bundleName": "employeeapplication.i18n.i18n"
        }
      },
      "": {
        "dataSource": "mainService",
        "preload": true,
        "settings": {}
      }
    },
    "resources": {
      "css": [
        {
          "uri": "css/style.css"
        }
      ],
      "js": [
        {
          "uri": "SharedBlocks/PersonalDetails.js"
        }
      ]
    },
    "blocks": {
      "uri": "SharedBlocks/",
      "blocks": {
        "PersonalDetails": {
          "uri": "SharedBlocks/PersonalDetails.js"
        }
      }
    },  
    "routing": {
      "config": {
        "routerClass": "sap.m.routing.Router",
        "viewType": "XML",
        "async": true,
        "viewPath": "employeeapplication.view",
        "controlAggregation": "pages",
        "controlId": "app",
        "clearControlAggregation": false
      },      
      "routes": [
        {
          "name": "Home",
          "pattern": "",
          "target": [
            "TargetEmployeeData"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "detail",
          "pattern": "product/{Empid}",
          "target": [
            "Targetpnl"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "create_personal_details",
          "pattern": "create",
          "target": [
            "Targetcreatepnl"
          ]
        }
       
      ],
      "targets": {
        "TargetEmployeeData": {
          "viewType": "XML",
          "transition": "slide",
          "clearControlAggregation": false,
          "viewName": "EmployeeData"
        },
        "Targetpnl": {
          "viewType": "XML",
          "transition": "slide",
          "clearControlAggregation": false,
          "viewName": "pnl"
        },
        "Targetcreatepnl": {
          "viewType": "XML",
          "transition": "slide",
          "clearControlAggregation": false,
          "viewName": "createpnl"
        }
       
      }
    },
    "rootView": {
      "viewName": "employeeapplication.view.App",
      "type": "XML",
      "async": true,
      "id": "App"
    }
  },
  "sap.cloud": {
    "public": true,
    "service": "employeeapplication"
  }
}


And my PersonalDetails.js file looks like this:

sap.ui.define([
"sap/ui/core/UIComponent"
], function(UIComponent) {
"use strict";

return UIComponent.extend("employeeapplication.SharedBlocks.PersonalDetails", {
metadata: {
properties: {
// your properties here
}
},

init: function() {
// your initialization code here
}
});
});

 

error in console  I am facing .
